message: Node started: Conduct a deep dive into theoretical physics literature (specifically focusing on quantum optics and black hole thermodynamics) to identify the three universal dimensionless constants that govern the classicality of single-photon Hawking radiation. Focus on parameters related to photon statistics (e.g., g^(2) correlation functions), Wigner function negativity, or the transition from quantum to classical regimes. For each constant, provide its name, symbol, and exact numerical value.
